headline: Nvidia Bets $6.5B on Photonics to Solve AI’s Next Big Bottleneck
summary: Chipmaker Nvidia (NVDA) has committed at least $6.5 billion over the past three months to photonics companies, as it looks for ways to remove one of the biggest bottlenecks in AI infrastructure, according to CNBC. For context, photonics uses light to move data instead of electricity, which can make data transfer faster and more energy efficient. That matters because today’s AI systems depend on massive amounts of data moving between GPUs, memory, networking chips, servers, and data centers. Clai
